title: Ceramic Sea Urchin Table Lamp
description:
Our artisans shaped this lamp base entirely by hand, building up each individual spike one at a time around a rounded ceramic body. The form is inspired by the ricci di mare — sea urchins — that you find all along the Amalfi Coast. It's the kind of piece that stops people mid-conversation when they walk into a room.

The ceramic base is finished in a deep, matte blue that shifts between teal and navy depending on the light. Each spike is slightly different in length and angle, giving the whole thing an organic, natural quality. A brass fitting rises from the centre and holds a classic white fabric lampshade, which softens the light nicely.

As a table lamp, it works well on a bedside table, a console in the entryway, or a sideboard in the living room. The scale is right for a medium-sized surface — substantial enough to be noticed but not so large that it overwhelms. The combination of the sculptural ceramic base with the simple shade keeps it balanced.

Made in Vietri sul Mare using traditional ceramic techniques. Because each spike is applied by hand, no two lamps come out exactly the same. Please note this piece is currently out of stock — contact us if you'd like to be notified when it's available again.
excerpt: A sculptural table lamp with a handmade ceramic sea urchin base in deep blue, topped with a white fabric shade. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: Ceramic Sea Urchin Table Lamp — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Handmade ceramic table lamp with sea urchin spike base in deep blue, crafted by artisans in Vietri sul Mare. By Ceramiche Da Mario.
